title: rubus ovatus
intro: Rubus ovatus, also known as the Japanese bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus ovatus include reducing swelling and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Rubus ovatus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems can also be used in infusions, salves, and poultices.
